synopsis: Star Wars: Adventures in Hyperspace is a series of Star Wars Legends young-reader novels that were written by Ryder Windham, illustrated by Robert Rath, and published by Scholastic. The series comprises two books—Fire Ring Race and Shinbone Showdown, both released on June 1, 2010—which follow the adventures of smugglers Han Solo and Chewbacca while working for Jabba the Hutt prior to the events of Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope.
title: Adventures In Hyperspace
